description: Minimal monorepo scaffold with an assistant-ui chat frontend and LangChain backend.
name: assistant-ui-langchain-chat

scripts.build: npm run build:backend && npm run build -w frontend
scripts.dev: concurrently -n backend,frontend -c blue,green "npm run dev:backend" "npm run dev:frontend"
scripts.typecheck: npm run typecheck:backend && npm run typecheck -w frontend
